titles.title: If you could see me now

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Our prayers have all been answered I've finally arrived The healing that had been delayed has now been realized No ones in a hurry there's no schedule to keep We're all enjoying Jesus just sitting at His feet

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If you could see me now I'm walking streets of gold If you could see me now I'm standing tall and whole If you could see me now You"d know I'd seen His face If you could see me now You'd know the pains erased You wouldn't want me to ever leave this place If you could only see me now

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My light and temporary trials have worked out for my good To know it brought Him glory when I misunderstood Though we've had our sorrows they can never compare When Jesus has in store for us no language can share
